observation.messy_prompt:
Customer email: Need 10,000 units by day 12. Same ABS as last time. Can you do $0.20/unit?
Operator note: M4 sounded rough this afternoon; might need maintenance.
Inventory: ABS=220kg, Nylon=80kg, PP=40kg.
Machine log: M1 uptime=95%, M2 uptime=90%, M3 uptime=92%, M4 uptime=88%.
HR: operator O2 out sick one day this period.
Current jobs: J122 due day 3 low priority; J124 due day 3 low priority; J131 due day 3 med priority.

mapping_profile.name: MAPF grid warehouse / ARMBench pick face

job_source.summary: Imported 181 ARMBENCH order lines across 160 orders (SKU references and quantities drawn from real ARMBENCH-SCHEMA orders), mapped to mapf-warehouse-10-20-10-2-2 (MAPF grid warehouse / ARMBench pick face): 61 source zones, 5 stations, 3 route constraints, 3 job families, layout pressure 0.743.
